title: rubus × nubilus
intro: Rubus × nubilus, also known as the clouded raspberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Rosaceae family and is a cross between Rubus idaeus and Rubus fruticosus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus × nubilus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, boost the immune system, and have antimicrobial properties. Rubus × nubilus can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
